title: Quibi
html: Stub. Yahir wrote a single bewildered "Quibi ?" in 2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist right when Quibi was launching mid-pandemic. (Quibi shut down October 2020.) Tiny entry but a useful timestamp for his attention.
